Interface AsyncApiComponents

All Superinterfaces:
Components, Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AsyncApi20Components, AsyncApi21Components, AsyncApi22Components, AsyncApi23Components, AsyncApi24Components, AsyncApi25Components, AsyncApi26Components, AsyncApi2xComponents, AsyncApi30Components, AsyncApi31Components, AsyncApi3xComponents
All Known Implementing Classes:
AsyncApi20ComponentsImpl, AsyncApi21ComponentsImpl, AsyncApi22ComponentsImpl, AsyncApi23ComponentsImpl, AsyncApi24ComponentsImpl, AsyncApi25ComponentsImpl, AsyncApi26ComponentsImpl, AsyncApi30ComponentsImpl, AsyncApi31ComponentsImpl
public interface AsyncApiComponents extends Components
